leadText: Ketchup (Japanese: ケチャップ Ketchup) is a type of ingredient introduced in Generation IX.

sections.title: Effect
sections.text: Effect [ edit | edit source ] It can be used as an ingredient in making a sandwich . It adds the following modifiers to a sandwich it is used on: 8 Sweet Taste 16 Salty Taste 16 Sour Taste -3 Egg Power 12 Exp. Power 21 Raid Power 2 Flying Type Power 2 Poison Type Power

sections.title: Description
sections.text: Description [ edit | edit source ] Games Description S V A condiment with very salty and tart flavor. While a number of other ingredients go into its signature flavor, the noble tomato is its heart and soul.

sections.title: In the core series games
